scripts.copy:assets: echo 'copy:assets'                && npm run copy:component_scss && npm run copy:base_sass && npm run copy:xtra_sass && npm run copy:svg && npm run copy:foundation
scripts.copy:dist:fonts: echo 'copy:dist:fonts'            && shx mkdir -p dist/fonts     && copyfiles --flat "node_modules/source-sans/WOFF*/**/*" dist/fonts && copyfiles --flat "node_modules/source-serif/WOFF*/**/*" dist/fonts
scripts.copy:public:fonts: echo 'copy:public:fonts'          && shx rm -rf public/fonts     && shx mkdir -p public/fonts && copyfiles --flat "node_modules/source-sans/WOFF*/**/*" public/fonts && copyfiles --flat "node_modules/source-serif/WOFF*/**/*" public/fonts
scripts.storybook: echo 'storybook'                  && npm run copy:public:fonts && npm run storybook:dev || echo 'Failed to start Storybook' >&2
scripts.prebuild:static:storybook: echo 'prebuild:static:storybook'  && npm run delete:static       && ts-node scripts/generate-versions.ts
scripts.build:static:storybook: echo 'build:static:storybook'     && npm run prebuild:static:storybook  && storybook build || echo 'Failed to build static Storybook into storybook-static folder' >&2
scripts.prebuild:lib: echo 'prebuild:lib'               && npm run delete:public:fonts && ts-node scripts/generate-versions.ts
scripts.build:lib:tsc: echo 'build:lib:tsc'              && npm run prebuild:lib        && tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && npm run postbuild:lib || echo 'Failed to build lib for deployment' >&2
scripts.build:lib:vite: echo 'build:lib:vite'             && npm run prebuild:lib        && vite build || echo 'Failed to build lib for deployment' >&2
scripts.postbuild:lib: echo 'postbuild:lib'              && npm run compile:styles      && npm run copy:assets && npm run copy:dist:fonts || (echo 'ERROR: postbuild:lib failed. Check compile:styles, copy:assets, or copy:dist:fonts' >&2 && exit 1)
scripts.pack:lib: echo 'pack:lib'                   && npm run build:lib           && npm pack
scripts.build: echo 'build'                      && npm run build:lib           && npm run build:static:storybook

_comments.js-cookie: Override (v3.0.8) added to solve CVE-2026-46625 due to dependency from js-beautify v1.15.4 (which is the latest version on 03.06.2026).
